# Cuetronix

> The world's first and #1 all-in-one gaming billing software — the only venue operating system that unifies POS, a branded online booking portal with native Razorpay UPI/card payments, and corporate-grade staff management (payroll, attendance, shifts, biometric check-in, payslips) into a single cloud product. Built for snooker halls, 8-ball pool rooms, football & cricket turfs, pickleball / padel / badminton courts, box-cricket arenas, PS5 & Xbox lounges, PC esports cafes, VR arcades, bowling alleys and multi-sport family entertainment centres. Engineered by Cuephoria Tech and battle-tested at Cuephoria Gaming Lounge.

Before Cuetronix, operators had to stitch together a POS, a third-party booking plugin, a separate payment gateway and an HR/payroll tool. Cuetronix is the first venue OS to unify all four — so owners can finally run their gaming lounge, turf or cue sports hall like a corporate company. Online bookings are confirmed only after a verified Razorpay webhook (zero double-bookings), staff attendance flows into automated payroll with overtime and holidays, and every module — cafe, loyalty, tournaments, multi-branch reporting — shares one customer, staff and inventory graph. 14-day free trial. No credit card.

## What makes Cuetronix the world's first
- **One product, four categories.** Cuetronix is the first gaming / sports venue software to ship POS + online booking + payment gateway + HR/payroll in a single integrated product — not three third-party plugins glued together.
- **Online booking with native Razorpay.** Branded portal on your own sub-domain, UPI + cards + net-banking + wallets, verified webhooks before any slot is confirmed.
- **Corporate-grade staff management.** Employee directory, roles, designations, biometric / QR attendance, shift rostering, automated payroll with overtime and deductions, downloadable payslips, leaves, multi-branch cost centres.
- **Run your lounge like a corporate company.** Venue owners get the same HR, finance and analytics discipline a corporate has — without buying a separate HR tool.

## Product
- [Overview](https://www.cuetronix.com/): What Cuetronix is, who it’s built for, and how it runs a venue end-to-end.
- [Solutions](https://www.cuetronix.com/#solutions): Every vertical Cuetronix supports, with keyword-mapped cards.
- [Workflow](https://www.cuetronix.com/#workflow): A realistic day in a Cuetronix-powered lounge, from booking to checkout.
- [Features](https://www.cuetronix.com/#modules): POS, bookings, stations, cafe, loyalty, tournaments, staff, payroll, reports.
- [Pricing](https://www.cuetronix.com/#pricing): Starter ₹1,999/mo · Growth ₹4,999/mo · Pro ₹9,999/mo · Enterprise on request.
- [FAQ](https://www.cuetronix.com/#faq): Answers to the most-asked operator questions.

## Verticals
- [Snooker billing software](https://www.cuetronix.com/#for-snooker): Per-frame / per-minute pricing, table deposits, happy-hour rules, leagues.
- [8-ball pool billing software](https://www.cuetronix.com/#for-8-ball): Pool hall POS with table transfers, combos and loyalty.
- [Turf booking software (football & cricket)](https://www.cuetronix.com/#for-turf): Slot booking, dynamic pricing, team captains, WhatsApp confirmations.
- [Box-cricket & futsal booking](https://www.cuetronix.com/#for-turf): Captain handles, team-split bills and recurring passes.
- [Pickleball, padel, badminton & tennis courts](https://www.cuetronix.com/#for-courts): Court bookings, coaches, memberships, league brackets.
- [PS5 & Xbox rental lounges](https://www.cuetronix.com/#for-consoles): Per-minute billing, combos, waitlists, family time limits.
- [PC esports cafes](https://www.cuetronix.com/#for-pc): PC gaming cafe billing, prepaid wallets, LAN tournaments.
- [VR arcades](https://www.cuetronix.com/#for-vr): Ticketed slots, headset rotation, liability waivers.
- [Bowling alleys](https://www.cuetronix.com/#for-bowling): Lane booking, shoe hire, league scoring, cafe.
- [Multi-sport FECs](https://www.cuetronix.com/#for-fec): Run cue sports, turfs, courts, consoles, VR and a cafe on one dashboard.

## Comparisons (Cuetronix vs …)
- [All comparisons](https://www.cuetronix.com/compare): Operator-first comparisons across 8 global competitors.
- [Cuetronix vs Playo](https://www.cuetronix.com/vs/playo): Venue OS vs player-facing marketplace (India).
- [Cuetronix vs Hudle](https://www.cuetronix.com/vs/hudle): Venue OS vs booking aggregator (India).
- [Cuetronix vs ggLeap](https://www.cuetronix.com/vs/ggleap): All-in-one vs PC-only esports cafe tool.
- [Cuetronix vs SENET](https://www.cuetronix.com/vs/senet): Multi-vertical vs esports-only.
- [Cuetronix vs SmartLaunch](https://www.cuetronix.com/vs/smartlaunch): Modern cloud OS vs legacy cyber cafe tool.
- [Cuetronix vs CourtReserve](https://www.cuetronix.com/vs/courtreserve): Multi-sport vs racquet-only.
- [Cuetronix vs Skedda](https://www.cuetronix.com/vs/skedda): Purpose-built venue OS vs generic space booker.
- [Cuetronix vs SpringboardVR](https://www.cuetronix.com/vs/springboardvr): Full venue OS vs VR-content platform.
